Class RutinaService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for workout routine lifecycle management.

public class RutinaService
Inheritance
object
RutinaService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

A client can have at most one active routine at any time. Creating a new routine automatically finalizes the existing one within the same transaction. Exercises are resolved by name and auto-created in the catalog if not found.

Constructors

RutinaService()

Initializes all dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public RutinaService()

Methods

BorrarRutina(Guid)

Permanently deletes a routine and its associated exercise links.

public void BorrarRutina(Guid rutinaId)

Parameters

rutinaId Guid

The routine to delete.

CrearRutina(RutinaDTO)

Creates a new routine for a client. If an active routine exists it is finalized first. Exercises not found in the catalog are auto-created.

public void CrearRutina(RutinaDTO dto)

Parameters

dto RutinaDTO

Routine data including a non-empty exercise list. Each exercise must have positive repetitions and a valid day (1–7).

Exceptions

Exception

Thrown for an empty exercise list, zero/negative repetitions, or out-of-range day values.

Exception

Thrown if the exercise list is empty, reps are zero, or day of week is out of range.

ListarRutinas(bool)

Returns all routines, optionally restricted to active ones, with ClienteNombre hydrated.

public List<RutinaDTO> ListarRutinas(bool soloActivas)

Parameters

soloActivas bool

When true, includes only routines with no end date.

Returns

List<RutinaDTO>

ModificarRutina(Guid, List<EjercicioDTO>)

Replaces the exercise set of an existing routine within a transaction (clears all existing routine-exercise links, then re-inserts the new set).

public void ModificarRutina(Guid rutinaId, List<EjercicioDTO> ejercicios)

Parameters

rutinaId Guid

The routine to modify.

ejercicios List<EjercicioDTO>

Non-empty replacement exercise list.

ObtenerRutina(Guid)

Returns a specific routine by ID with its full exercise list hydrated.

public RutinaDTO ObtenerRutina(Guid rutinaId)

Parameters

rutinaId Guid

The routine identifier.

Returns

RutinaDTO

The RutinaDTO, or null if not found.

ObtenerRutinaActiva(Guid)

Returns the client's currently active routine with its full exercise list hydrated.

public RutinaDTO ObtenerRutinaActiva(Guid clienteId)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client to look up.

Returns

RutinaDTO

The active RutinaDTO, or null if none exists.
